name: Plurilock Security Inc.
summary: Plurilock Security Solutions Inc., an identity-centric cybersecurity company, provides multi-factor authentication solutions using behavioral-biometric, environmental, and contextual technologies. The company offers Plurilock ADAPT, an augmented behavioral biometrics, which provides out-of-band multi-factor authentication by analyzing identity signals; and Plurilock DEFEND, a patented behavioral biometrics that recognizes users by the way they work. It serves financial services, healthcare, critical infrastructure, and government and military industries. The company is headquartered in Victoria, Canada.
